expected.title: Recommendation Accuracy Improvement
expected.description: Measure improvement in recommendation accuracy after Langfuse integration.

expected.title: User Engagement Improvement
expected.description: Measure improvement in user engagement metrics after Langfuse integration.

expected.title: Debugging Time Reduction
expected.description: Measure reduction in debugging time for AI models.

expected.title: Compliance Violations Reduction
expected.description: Reduce compliance violations through enhanced monitoring.

expected.title: Actionable Insights from Langfuse Data
expected.description: Derive actionable insights from Langfuse data to optimize recommendations.

expected.title: Prompt Management Adoption
expected.description: Track the adoption rate of prompt management features and the impact on model performance.
expected.metric: Adoption rate of prompt management features

expected.title: Langfuse Deployment in Railway
expected.description: Successfully deploy and configure Langfuse within ADPA's Railway infrastructure.

expected.title: ADPA Integration with Langfuse
expected.description: Seamlessly integrate ADPA's recommendation workflows to send structured traces and observations to Langfuse.
expected.target_value: Established for at least one key workflow

expected.title: Key Dashboards Creation
expected.description: Develop dashboards within Langfuse to visualize key metrics and monitor model performance.

expected.title: Compliance Monitoring Implementation
expected.description: Implement compliance monitoring features within Langfuse to ensure adherence to regulatory standards.

expected.title: Increase Recommendation Accuracy
expected.description: Implement prompt management features within Langfuse, and version prompts while tracking prompt impact

expected.description: Verify successful deployment and configuration of Langfuse in Railway.

expected.title: Key Dashboards Creation Rate

expected.title: Data Scientists Training Participation Rate
expected.description: Achieve high participation rate in training sessions for data scientists.
